attributes.action: Urgently repair potholes in Manchester and introduce regular road inspections
attributes.additional_details: Potholes in Manchester damage vehicles and pose serious safety risks for drivers, cyclists, and pedestrians. Many roads remain unrepaired despite reports. We urge the Government to increase funding, enforce faster repairs, and require regular inspections to prevent accidents and ensure safe, reliable roads for all.
attributes.background: We call on the UK Government to take urgent action on potholes in Manchester. Poor road conditions are damaging vehicles and creating safety risks for drivers, cyclists, and pedestrians. We ask for increased funding, faster repairs, and regular inspections to prevent further damage.
